src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Modernize Javadoc comments to use code formatting and correct capitalization.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.before:
* This is a helper Java class that provides an alternative to creating a web.xml.
 * This will be invoked only when the application is deployed to a servlet container like Tomcat, Jboss etc.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.after:
* This is a helper Java class that provides an alternative to creating a {@code web.xml}.
 * This will be invoked only when the application is deployed to a Servlet container like Tomcat, JBoss etc.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace block comment with single-line comment for profile configuration note.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.after: // set a default to use when no profile is configured.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Switch from field injection to constructor injection for the Environment bean.
Remove throws UnknownHostException from main method and handle it internally.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.before: public static void main(String[] args) throws UnknownHostException {

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Refactor startup logging to use a dedicated method with improved URL construction.
Update documentation URLs from jhipster.github.io to www.jhipster.tech.
Replace field injection with constructor injection for the Environment dependency.
Update import to use JHipsterConstants instead of local Constants class.
Update profile check to use Profiles.of() API instead of varargs string.
Refactor pointcut to use annotation-based matching for Spring beans.
Extract logger retrieval into a helper method to avoid repeating class name logic.
Update logging statements to use the dynamic logger and remove redundant class name from message.
Switch from field injection to constructor injection for dependency injection.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: While field injection still compiles, this change aligns with modern Spring best practices and often accompanies the removal of the @Inject annotation if the JSR-330 dependency is removed or if the project enforces constructor injection via static analysis tools.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace wildcard import with explicit imports for Spring scheduling annotations.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Wildcard imports are often discouraged by code style checkers (like Checkstyle or SpotBugs) configured in newer JHipster versions, leading to build failures if strict checks are enabled.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove unused javax.inject.Inject import.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The import is no longer needed after switching to constructor injection, and keeping it may trigger unused import warnings or errors in strict build configurations.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace field injection with constructor injection for required dependencies to adhere to modern Spring best practices.
Replace deprecated `Constants.SPRING_PROFILE_DEVELOPMENT` with `JHipsterConstants.SPRING_PROFILE_DEVELOPMENT` and use `Profiles.of()` for profile checking.
Update Hazelcast configuration to use the newer `EvictionConfig` API instead of deprecated direct setters on `MapConfig`.
Externalize Hazelcast cache configuration values (backup count, time-to-live) from `JHipsterProperties` instead of hardcoding them.
Refactor Hazelcast instance creation to use `Hazelcast.newHazelcastInstance` and add idempotency check to prevent duplicate instances.
Add support for service registration via `Registration` interface to improve cluster member discovery robustness.
Add a custom `KeyGenerator` bean using `PrefixedKeyGenerator` to ensure cache keys are unique across different application versions/commits.
Remove static state and the associated getter method for the Hazelcast instance to improve thread safety and testability.
Remove unused constant LOGIN_REGEX from the Constants class.
Remove unused Spring profile constants (dev, prod, cloud, heroku, swagger, no-liquibase) from the Constants class.
Rename constant SYSTEM_ACCOUNT to SYSTEM and update its value.
Format the private constructor body to be empty on a single line.
Replace deprecated javax.inject.Inject with constructor injection for Spring dependency management.
Refactor H2 TCP server bean to use JHipster's H2ConfigurationHelper for port management.
Remove manual Liquibase bean configuration in favor of Spring Boot auto-configuration.
Remove explicit Hibernate4Module bean definition as it is handled by auto-configuration or no longer needed.
Update import statements to use JHipster constants and remove unused imports.
Remove explicit bean name from localeResolver bean definition.
Consolidate Spring Web MVC imports into a wildcard import.
Replace manual Logback appender configuration with JHipster's centralized LoggingUtils helper methods.
Switch from field injection to constructor injection for Spring beans and configuration properties.
Remove dependency on Java EE javax.inject annotations in favor of Spring-specific or standard Java annotations.
Remove dependency on Java EE javax.annotation annotations.
Add support for JSON console logging using JHipster utilities.
Include application version in logging custom fields using Spring Boot BuildProperties.
Add RefreshScope to allow logging configuration to be refreshed via Spring Cloud Config.
Replace manual JSON string concatenation for custom fields with Jackson ObjectMapper serialization.
Switch from field injection to constructor injection for Spring beans to align with modern best practices.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.before: @Inject private Environment env; @Inject private JHipsterProperties jHipsterProperties;
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.after: private final Environment env; private final JHipsterProperties jHipsterProperties; public WebConfigurer(Environment env, JHipsterProperties jHipsterProperties) { ... }

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove manual registration of Codahale Metrics filters and servlets, likely replaced by Spring Boot Actuator auto-configuration.
Remove manual H2 Console servlet registration in favor of a dedicated helper class.
Update profile checking logic to use the new `Profiles` API introduced in Spring Framework 5.0.
Fix generic array logging warning by casting the array to Object[] before passing to SLF4J.
Update CORS configuration to include new API documentation endpoints (v3, swagger-resources) and management endpoints.
Add conditional check for CORS allowed origins to prevent configuration errors when origins are not defined.
Remove unused dependencies and imports related to Hazelcast and optional metrics.
Remove Envers auditing annotation to simplify the base entity class.
Replace ZonedDateTime with Instant for audit timestamps to align with modern JPA/Hibernate best practices.
Replace ZonedDateTime with Instant for last modified timestamp to align with modern JPA/Hibernate best practices.
Update getter and setter signatures for createdDate to use Instant instead of ZonedDateTime.
Update getter and setter signatures for lastModifiedDate to use Instant instead of ZonedDateTime.
Change column constraint for created_date from nullable=false to updatable=false to enforce immutability at the schema level.
Reorder and clean up import statements to follow standard conventions and remove unused imports.
